mapper.insert: INSERT INTO favorite (userId, businessId, createTime) VALUES (#{userId}, #{businessId}, NOW())
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM favorite WHERE userId = #{userId} AND businessId = #{businessId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM favorite WHERE userId = #{userId} AND businessId = #{businessId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM favorite WHERE businessId = #{businessId}

SELECT f.favoriteId, f.userId, f.businessId, f.createTime, b.businessName, b.businessAddress, b.businessExplain, b.businessImg, b.orderTypeId, b.starPrice, b.deliveryPrice, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM favorite WHERE businessId = f.businessId) AS favoriteCount FROM favorite f LEFT JOIN business b ON f.businessId = b.businessId WHERE f.userId = #{userId} ORDER BY f.createTime DESC
